meaning: n.脓疮vi.溃烂,化脓vt.使烦恼,使溃烂
examples: Other arguments will continue to fester.
This way, small problems do not fester into big ones.
But until there is clear commitment from the top down, this issue can continue to fester.
Twenty-two years after the last U.S. combat troops left Vietnam, old psychic wounds still fester.
